title: Transcriptomic changes in adipose tissue across metabolic-disease severity

findings.executive_summary: Bulk RNA-seq across stages of a metabolic disease to find genes and pathways that track severity. Differential expression with edgeR and gene-set enrichment.

embedding.source_text: Transcriptomic changes in adipose tissue across metabolic-disease severity | Bulk RNA-seq across stages of a metabolic disease to find genes and pathways that track severity. Differential expression with edgeR and gene-set enrichment. | Methods: differential expression, GSEA | Data: RNA-seq | Disease: metabolic disease, obesity | Tools: edgeR, fgsea, ggplot2
